positive: Minimalist geometric tropical jungle scene, featuring stylized monstera leaves and palm fronds interlocking with abstract gold line art. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, creating a repeating pattern suitable for tile print. Use a limited, high-contrast palette: emerald green, deep indigo blue, and metallic gold accents. Strong, clean silhouettes with sharp edges. Flat vector graphic style with subtle texture overlay. High-key lighting emphasizing contrast and clean lines. Concept: Nature meets Art Deco.
